source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for 見出し, 本文, ラベル, and 数値 rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px product grids, leaf-vein separators, washi texture panels, dense dashboard cards, and calm Japanese autumn hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent momiji motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a Japanese autumn maple branch with vivid momiji leaves, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A graceful branch of Japanese maple leaves in peak autumn color, with red, crimson, vermilion, amber, and copper leaves, delicate stems, accurate botanical leaf shapes, natural veins, and crisp edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the leaves or branch.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural autumn color and fine leaf detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no green leaves.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Momiji" derived from the visible transparent Japanese autumn maple leaf cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the red, vermilion, amber, copper, brown branch, and delicate leaf-vein shapes in the visible momiji cutout. The board must visibly respect the leaf colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Momiji, 紅葉, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Inter, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, soft handmade washi paper texture, delicate leaf-vein dividers, quiet Japanese autumn mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: ivory washi, maple red, vermilion, amber, copper, bark brown, deep sumi ink, muted leaf shadow.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Momiji" or "紅葉".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Momiji design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent momiji cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Momiji board as references. Preserve the maple leaf palette roles, component language, washi texture, leaf-vein dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Momiji, 紅葉, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from sumi ink and bark brown, light text from ivory washi, primary accents from momiji red and vermilion, secondary accents from amber and copper, restrained contrast, subtle maple leaf and vein texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Inter, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Momiji" or "紅葉".

prompts.label: Website hero asset
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Momiji website hero/background asset
Primary request: Create a polished website hero image in the exact visual style of the visible Morphous Momiji light and dark design-system boards.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent momiji cutout plus the visible light and dark Momiji boards as style references.
Composition: wide 16:9 banner with visual interest on the right and low-detail negative space on the left reserved for live HTML text. Include Japanese maple branches, layered washi paper, faint leaf-vein dividers, subtle angular Kyoto garden stone shapes, and minimal shadcn-style card accents near the lower edge.
Visual details: momiji red, vermilion, amber, copper, bark brown, sumi ink, ivory washi, refined neutral palette, subtle paper grain, crisp but minimal UI accents.
Text: no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: no stock-photo look, no busy background behind left text area, no unrelated colors, no purple/blue gradients.

prompts.label: Washi momiji texture asset
prompts.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Morphous Momiji texture/background asset
Primary request: Create a seamless-feeling square texture tile in the exact visual style of the visible Morphous Momiji design-system boards.
Reference use: Use the visible momiji cutout and light/dark design boards as references.
Composition: square 1:1 all-over pattern, no central subject, suitable for CSS backgrounds, card accents, and preview panels.
Visual details: layered washi paper, Japanese maple leaf silhouettes, fine leaf-vein lines, faint seigaiha wave geometry, muted amber and vermilion leaf fragments, bark brown fibers, ivory paper grain, low-to-medium contrast, tactile texture, no hard seams.
Text: no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: no UI elements, no unrelated saturated colors, no noisy camouflage, no purple/blue gradients.

prompts.label: Dashboard app example
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Momiji themed app example 1 of 5
Primary request: Generate a polished analytics dashboard screen in the exact style of the visible Morphous Momiji design system.
Reference use: Use the visible momiji motif, light board, dark board, hero, and texture as references.
Canvas: 16:9 desktop web app screen.
Required visible sections: sidebar navigation, top search bar, four metric cards, line chart, bar chart, activity list, compact status cards, subtle maple texture accents.
Style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, precise grid, 8px radius, ivory washi surfaces, momiji red primary actions, amber/copper chart accents, bark brown text, soft borders.
Text: short readable labels only: Dashboard, Overview, Revenue, Sessions, Conversion, Activity, Export, Search.
Constraints: no unrelated colors, no random logos, no marketing hero layout, no unreadable tiny paragraphs, no purple/blue gradients.

prompts.label: Workflow app example
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Momiji themed app example 2 of 5
Primary request: Generate a polished workflow and settings form screen in the exact style of the visible Morphous Momiji design system.
Reference use: Use the visible momiji motif, light board, dark board, hero, and texture as references.
Canvas: 16:9 desktop web app screen.
Required visible sections: sidebar navigation, page header, segmented tabs, two-column form, validation states, progress stepper, summary card, primary and secondary actions, subtle Japanese maple texture accent.
Style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, precise grid, 8px radius, ivory washi cards, momiji red primary button, amber focus rings, copper status details, bark brown text.
Text: short readable labels only: Workflow, Profile, Access, Review, Name, Email, Role, Status, Save draft, Continue.
Constraints: no unrelated colors, no random logos, no marketing hero layout, no unreadable tiny paragraphs, no purple/blue gradients.
